description: Create a device group named 'DMZ_Servers' with the description 'Demilitarized zone servers for perimeter monitoring' in ManageEngine EventLog Analyzer (http://localhost:8095, login: admin / admin). Assign the local syslog source (127.0.0.1) to this group and save a screenshot showing the group and its assigned member to /tmp/device_group_result.png.

metadata.expected_description: Demilitarized zone servers for perimeter monitoring
